Title: Enable or disable scheduled jobs in Database Objects
Description: You can now enable or disable scheduled jobs from their details page in Database Objects. The Properties tab displays whether a job is enabled or disabled.

Title: Upload multiple files at once in the Data Lake Files app
Description: In the Data Lake Files app, you can now upload or drag and drop multiple files at once into the File Explorer. There is now an Upload Progress table. See Using Data Lake Files in SAP HANA Cloud Central.

Title: Provision large instances with >12 TB memory
Description: You can now provision large instances with memory larger than 12 TB to support enterprise workloads that require substantial memory and processing power.  See:    Large SAP HANA Database Instances (>12 TB Memory)  Memory and Storage Sizes Supported by SAP HANA Database  3717342

Title: View PRINT_LINE statement outputs in the SQL Console
Description: PRINT_LINE statement outputs now appear in the Console Output section of the Result tab. See Built-in Library SQLSCRIPT_PRINT.

Title: SAP HANA Cloud now a core component in SAP Business Data Cloud
Description: SAP HANA Cloud is now available as a core component in SAP Business Data Cloud. This means you can use SAP Business Data Cloud credits to provision an SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database.  See:   SAP Note 3737180   Provisioning SAP HANA Cloud

Title: Container and credential limits increased
Description: Up to 72 containers (schemas or HDI containers) and 144 credentials can be created per database tenant.  See: Feature Limitations

Title: Filter and search in the Connect Instance dialog
Description: You can now search your instances in the Connect Instance dialog in the SQL Console and the Database Objects app. You can also filter by instance type and choose to show running instances only.

Title: Improved Columns and Parameters lists in the Syntax Help side panel
Description: In the Syntax Help side panel, the lists of Columns and Parameters are now collapsible. You can filter each list by name or datatype. You can also select a column name to insert it directly into the SQL Console.

Title: Restore closed tabs in the SQL Console
Description: You can now restore up to 10 of your most recently-closed tabs in the SQL Console. See Managing Tabs.

Title: Use Gen AI in the SQL Console
Description: You can now use Gen AI in the SQL Console to generate, explain, and optimize SQL statements. See Using Gen AI in the SQL Console.

Title: SAP HANA Application Migration Visual Studio Code extension
Description: You can now migrate to SAP HANA Cloud with a Visual Studio Code extension. The SAP HANA Application Migration Visual Studio Code extension streamlines the migration process by providing dedicated tools and guidance within the development environment.  See:     Install Application Migration Extension for SAP HANA  Migrate an XS Classic Application to SAP CAP and SAP HANA Cloud with the SAP HANA Application Migration in Visual Studio Code  Migrate an XS Classic Application to SAP HANA Native with the SAP HANA Application Migration in Visual Studio Code  Migrate an XS Advanced Application to SAP CAP and SAP HANA Cloud with the SAP HANA Application Migration in Visual Studio Code

Title: Delete Selected Plans from Plan Trace
Description: You can now delete selected traced SQL queries and their execution plans.  See Plan Trace in SAP HANA Cloud Central.

Title: Subaccount Mapping for Creating Tenants
Description: You can now map an instance to a subaccount to create new tenants.See Map an SAP HANA Database to Another Environment Context.

Title: Upgrading Data Access Agents without a restart
Description: You can choose to upgrade a Data Access Agent without restarting it with minimal downtime.

Title: View, filter, and sort instances by date
Description: The instance list now has a Created On column. You can view, filter, and sort instances by date.

Title: Performance Analyzer
Description: Use the Performance Monitor app to identify performance issues of your SAP HANA Cloud database instances, visualize historical data, and use views to analyze specific performance scenarios.  See Using the Performance Analyzer in SAP HANA Cloud Central.

Title: Create an ECN policy
Description: Create an ECN Policy from an ECN Advisor recommendation, for automated ECN provisioning and deprovisioning based on a schedule or on thresholds (CPU/memory).  See About ECN Policies.

Title: Improved Visibility into Workload Class Thread Limits
Description: View effective memory and thread limits applied to each thread in the Threads application. New columns show the resource constraints that were active during thread execution, including inherited limits from parent workload classes.  See View Effective Thread Limits in the Threads Application.

Title: Decouple thin clone
Description: You can now decouple a data lake Relational Engine thin clone from its parent instance.  See Decouple a Thin Clone.

Title: New directory for query plans
Description: HTML query plans now write to a dedicated subfolder in the diagnostic logs directory in the data lake Files container: /diag/logs/queryplans. The filename now includes USER_ID for increased readability and easier searching.  This new directory structure makes it easier to find your query plans and work with them.   See Diagnostic Logs for Data Lake Relational Engine.

Title: DECLARE EXISTING LOCAL TEMPORARY TABLE Statement
Description: The DECLARE EXISTING LOCAL TEMPORARY TABLE statement now supports the EXISTING parameter.  See DECLARE LOCAL TEMPORARY TABLE Statement for Data Lake Relational Engine.

Title: List and delete query plans
Description: Stored procedures sp_list_query_plans and sp_delete_query_plan now let you manage query plans. See sp_list_query_plans Stored Procedure, sp_delete_query_plan Stored Procedure.

Title: Load from Delta Shares
Description: The data lake Relational Engine LOAD TABLE statement syntax was extended to let you load data from Delta Tables stored on public Delta Shares. See:  LOAD Statement (Non-Parquet Formats)  Load Data from Delta Shares in Data Lake Relational Engine  LOAD Statement (Non-Parquet Formats) for Data Lake Relational Engine (SAP HANA DB-Managed)  Load Data From Delta Shares in Data Lake Relational Engine (SAP HANA DB-Managed)

Title: Support for small 16GB database instances
Description: You can now provision database instances with 16GB memory for AWS regions. Use this option for cost-sensitive workloads that don't require larger instance sizes.   See Managing Smaller SAP HANA Instances.

Title: Multi-Tenant Audit Policy Support
Description: You can now create audit policies that automatically apply to tables with the same name across all tenants. Previously, you had to manually update audit policies every time you added or removed a tenant. With the new wildcard schema support, a single audit policy can now monitor the same table across all tenant schemas without requiring updates when tenants are added or removed.   See:     Feature Limitations  Best Practices and Recommendations for Creating Audit Policies  Performance Considerations
